---
description: "Plan a new feature for MyEditor aligned with AI-native principles."
---

Plan the implementation of a new feature for MyEditor.

Before writing any code:
1. Review PROJECT_GOAL.md for alignment with the project vision
2. Check .github/copilot-instructions.md for design constraints
3. Consider how this feature integrates with the AI-first architecture
4. Identify what existing modules are affected
5. Define behavioral acceptance criteria (not just unit tests)

Output a structured plan with:
- Feature description and motivation
- Architecture impact assessment
- Implementation phases (ordered)
- Files to create or modify
- Testing strategy (including behavioral validation)
- Risks and open questions
